ItemContainer.OnlyOnActor: Container contents are available only when this item is on a character.
ItemContainer.WorldModeHint: World container: stores links (UUIDs) to Items. Drag rows onto a character sheet inventory to move them into that actor (recursive).
ItemContainer.WorldDropHint: Drag an Item here from the sidebar or compendium (not from a character sheet).
ItemContainer.WorldRefreshHint: Remove broken UUID links from this list
ItemContainer.DropEmbeddedNotAllowed: Cannot link an item that is still on a character. Move it to the world/sidebar first, or drag from compendium.
ItemContainer.MovedFromWorldContainer: Moved from world container into this character.
ItemContainer.UnlinkConfirm: Remove this link from the container? The Item itself is not deleted.
ItemContainer.WorldExtractHint: Drag this row onto a character inventory to move it (world mode).
ItemContainer.CreateInside: Create a new item inside this container
ItemContainer.RefreshHint: Rebuild the ordered list from items on the actor (fixes drift)
ItemContainer.DropHint: Drag an item from the same character here to store it.
ItemContainer.MoveFailed: Could not place the item in this container.
ItemContainer.DropNotAnItem: That drop is not an item.
ItemContainer.DropWrongActor: The item must belong to the same character as this container.
ItemContainer.CycleWarning: That would create a nested container loop.

ItemWeapon.DefaultAttackIdHint: Matches an attack variant id below
ItemWeapon.AmmoKeepChamberOnReload: Keep round in chamber on reload
ItemWeapon.AmmoSideHint: Attack variants are defined on the weapon item; this tab stores ammo projectile and resource parameters only.
ItemWeapon.OverridesHint: Leave fields empty to inherit from base stats.
ItemWeapon.OutOfScopeCombat: These values are for authoring only; combat/shooting integration is not wired yet.
ItemWeapon.NestedParentPathHint: Optional: nested id path such as magazineId

Sheet.Title: Material
Sheet.MaterialIdHint: Stable identifier referenced by armour layers (e.g. "steel-plate").
Sheet.BreachCapacityHint: Defaults to integrity per thickness when zero.
Sheet.HardnessHint: Scalar material hardness used by the v3 armour rating: hardness × thickness². Resistance rows scale this by damage type.
Sheet.ConductanceHint: Fraction of the incoming hit that passes through as the given type to the next layer, independent of blocking. Leave empty for default. JSON: [{"type":"electric","fraction":0.9}, …]
Sheet.SelfInductionHint: When the layer holds this damage type, the listed fractions are converted and damage the layer's own integrity. If integrity runs out, the remainder overflows into the next layer. Leave empty for default. JSON: [{"type":"thermal","fraction":0.2}, …]
Sheet.DegradationHint: Leave empty to inherit the damage-type default.

SteelPlate.Label: Steel plate
SteelPlate.Description: Hardened steel armour plate. Solid all-rounder against ballistics and impacts; vulnerable to thermal and chemical attack.

Kevlar.Label: Kevlar weave
Kevlar.Description: Aramid fibre weave. Stops bullets but slowly accumulates breach holes.

Foam.Label: Impact foam
Foam.Description: Soft cushioning layer. Eats up residual blunt impulses without breaking down quickly.

Ablative.Label: Ablative film
Ablative.Description: Sacrificial heat-shielding film. Dumps thermal/laser energy but is consumed quickly.

Skin.Label: Skin
Skin.Description: Living dermis. Thin and fragile; offers almost no protection on its own, but absorbs a small share of thermal before burning through.

Muscle.Label: Muscle
Muscle.Description: Soft tissue bulk. Moderate resistance to blunt and piercing impulses; partially redistributes damage past itself when torn.

Bone.Label: Bone
Bone.Description: Skeletal structure. Holds against narrow piercing/cutting loads until cracked; when held, hands much of the impulse to surrounding tissue.

Concussive.Label: Concussive
Concussive.Description: Massive low-velocity impulse / blunt impact / shockwave.

Piercing.Label: Piercing
Piercing.Description: Slow point-load — spikes, picks, narrow blades on the thrust.

Cutting.Label: Cutting
Cutting.Description: Pressure along an edge — blades, claws, large fragments.

Thermal.Label: Thermal
Thermal.Description: Direct heat — flame, thermite, super-hot gases.

Laser.Label: Laser
Laser.Description: Coherent EM beam, absorbed as concentrated heat.

Plasma.Label: Plasma
Plasma.Description: Hot ionized matter — kinetic, thermal and weakly electric.

Electric.Label: Electric
Electric.Description: Current or induced EMF — short-circuits and arcs through dielectrics.

Sonic.Label: Sonic
Sonic.Description: Acoustic wave — impedance mismatch reflects most of it.

Radiation.Label: Radiation
Radiation.Description: Ionising radiation — poorly stopped by thin layers.

Chemical.Label: Chemical
Chemical.Description: Corrosives and reagents — mostly eats armour rather than transferring damage.

Tooltip.Jumps: MVP: high / long from Strength + Dexterity (m).
Tooltip.JumpHigh: MVP: vertical jump from Strength + Dexterity.
Tooltip.JumpLong: MVP: long jump from Strength + Dexterity.
Tooltip.TravelSpeed: MVP: combat movement speed (m/s). Distance per AP slice still drives `system.speed` (AP per distance).

EquippedColumn.Title: Equipped gear
EquippedColumn.NoCoverage: No body zones configured on this item.
EquippedColumn.NoMatchingParts: No matching body parts on this character.

Anatomy3d.Title: 3D preview
Anatomy3d.Hint: Drag to rotate, scroll to zoom. Click a sphere to select a body part.

HealthAnatomy3d.Name: Use 3D anatomy preview on the Health tab
HealthAnatomy3d.Hint: GM only. When enabled, the sheet loads WebGL and tries 3D first, then falls back to the 2D grid (for example while editing the layout). Turning this on or off requires a reload so the client can load or skip 3D code.

AimingArc.PanelHint: Zones use weights; zone widths are computed proportionally from total arc size.

AimingArc.WeightsHint: Standard zone weights (green→red): weight ratios define actual zone sizes.
AimingArc.DeviationHint: Standard aiming applies x1/x2/x4 to yellow/orange/red zones.

Messages.AimingActivated: Aiming mode activated. LMB - shoot, RMB/ESC - cancel
